title: Be able to switch side an IF/Else workflow starts on?
excerpt:
When adding an If/Else statement in your workflow it will always put the existing workflow on the “Yes” side. There should be a way to either switch sides.

posts.author: UFAI (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
When adding an If/Else statement in your workflow it will always put the existing workflow on the “Yes” side. There should be a way to either switch sides.

image676×721 27.8 KB

I’m now having to rebuild a 50 step workflow because I wanted an additional If/Else early in the workflow, but it puts the workflow on the “Yes” path but I need it on the “No”.

posts.author: UFAI (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
This has been implemented!

image783×549 32.2 KB
